LanguageData.Diary_Memory.label: pawn memory policy
LanguageData.Diary_Memory.ageBands.0.label: a few days ago
LanguageData.Diary_Memory.ageBands.1.label: a couple of weeks ago
LanguageData.Diary_Memory.ageBands.2.label: a few quadrums ago
LanguageData.Diary_Memory.ageBands.3.label: a long time ago
LanguageData.Diary_Memory.memoryContextInstruction: Long-standing memories that drift into mind while writing. Weave in at most one, briefly and only if it feels natural; these are the past, not today's events.
